name: TNDP Executive Committee
subject: beyond ridiculous
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
The TNDP executive committee wishes Mary Mancini the absolute best in her future endeavors after serving six years as chair. We will be forever grateful for her steadfast commitment to Tennessee Democrats, and the countless accomplishments achieved under her leadership.
With Mary at the helm, Tennessee Democrats saw the first net gain in legislature in over two decades and the first net gain in the state senate since the 80’s. With the help of her team she expanded the number of active county parties and created the TNDP caucus program to increase representation of underserved groups. She recruited the largest number of state legislative candidates in over a quarter century and made history as our longest serving chair.
The tides of American politics are shifting, and we owe our deepest gratitude to Mary Mancini for consistently steering Tennessee towards a better future. We know many of you will miss her spark and personality as she continually pushed boundaries and made a difference. That is why we are asking you to join us today in saying thank you to Chairwoman Mancini, by making a donation to the TNDP in her honor. Help us send Mary off with a united statement of appreciation, and let us then continue her great work towards a better future for Tennessee! [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Thank you,
The TNDP Executive Committee

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: They're Betraying Us
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=they_re_betraying_us&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Things are moving incredibly fast in politics right now, so let me catch you up on where things stand right now... **Liberty champion Erik Mortensen was prepared and ready to make another motion on Monday to get a vote on the End Walz' Emergency Power Resolution. His objective this year is to stop Walz' unilateral reign and then[make him pay for it](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=kZuFY8l3J9G8vE1AIGepPWEfE_gyOyIqVKFJsIa3O7-ABT5hnqThWhTgzwVo1g27&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=they_re_betraying_us&n=2).** Seeing that he was going to be upstaged by a freshman legislator, Minority Leader & RINO Kurt Daudt arranged a deal with the Democrat Speaker to be recognized first on the exact same motion. Of course, with Daudt, an agreement was made between Democrats and Republicans that there wasn't going to be a chance for success on the motion. Instead they have other ideas for Minnesota. More on that in a minute. What was most telling about the vote is that Reps Marquart, Pelowski, Sandstede, Lislegard, Sundin and Ecklund are clearly a bunch of Con Artists who betrayed their voters. Last year, with an important election looming, they voted to remove Governor Walz' Emergency Powers when the chance of it passing was small. But now when their vote mattered, they reneged on their promise to their constituents. Which means it's our job now to apply pain! That's all politicians respond to in the end. They care about one thing: getting re-elected. So we're making sure that voters in their district know about their betrayal. **We now have radio ads up in Winona, Moorhead, Hibbing, Virginia, Moose Lake and Cloquet. Here's our ad on Con Artist Julie Sandstede:** [](https://www.action4liberty.com/sandstede_radio_ad?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=they_re_betraying_us&n=3) We also have lit dropping teams heading up to several districts this weekend to spread the message of how politicians like Julie Sandstede are betraying them. **Now, the betrayal doesn't stop with these six Democrat Con Artists. There's also a significant problem in the Republican ranks. Remember when we told you last week how this fight would go down? Let's recap...** First they will try to **Kill the Resolution**. The Democrats certainly did a good job blocking it the first week of the Legislature, but we got around that hurdle. Secondly, they would **avoid hearing it**. Well, that didn't work either because we understood the rules of the House. So we got a vote on Ending Walz' Emergency Powers. When killing and avoiding doesn't work, Democrat, and even Republican leadership, will start **watering down the Resolution**. And that's precisely where they want this battle to go! While we are busy getting clean votes on the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution and pressuring vulnerable Democrats to do the right thing, Daudt and Democrat leadership are behind closed doors, crafting a Fake End Walz' Power bill. In fact, they even assembled a special committee with Con Artist Gene Pelowski and RINO Kurt Daudt as the leads. The committee is tasked to create a bill, some time in the next couple weeks, to reconfigure Chapter 12 Emergency Powers law. In other words, they are seeking to make Walz' powers permanent. Here's how you know it's a Fake Bill. Unlike the End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution, a bill actually requires the Governor's signature. How good could this bill be if Governor Walz is willing to sign it? Either they'll pass something so pathetic, and irrelevant, or they will waste a month of our time with the false hope that Walz' Powers will be killed, only to watch him veto it in the end.
## That's why we MUST oppose the Fake End Walz' Powers bill.
Any self respecting conservative should not be running cover for Walz with a Fake End Walz' Powers bill. In fact, there should be NO DEALS, NO COMPROMISE, NO PASSING ANYTHING in the entire House until the Emergency Powers are squashed! But a couple Republicans lined up to be on the Committee to draft the Fake Bill. One of them is Rep Marion O'Neill. What is she doing on this committee? She represents a strong, conservative district in Wright County who would be up in flames to know that she is doing this?
### Rep Marion O'Neill
### phone: 651-296-5063
### email: [rep.marion.oneill@house.mn](mailto:rep.marion.oneill@house.mn)
And what about aspiring gubernatorial candidate Rep Barb Haley of Red Wing? Why is she working against us to craft such a piece of garbage?!
### Rep Barb Haley
### phone: 651-296-8635
### email: [rep.barb.haley@house.mn](mailto:rep.barb.haley@house.mn)
**I'd recommend telling them to STOP supporting the Fake End Walz' Power bill on the Subcommittee on Legislative Reform. No good bill that actually Ends Walz' Emergency Powers will get his signature. Stop wasting time and focus on forcing a vote on Mortensen's End Walz' Emergency Powers Resolution.** To sum things up. We learned this week that Reps Marquart, Pelowski, Sandstede, Lislegard, Sundin & Ecklund are a bunch of Con Artists who betrayed their voters on Ending Walz' Emergency Powers. It's our job at Action 4 Liberty to bring the pain, which is why we are executing a large pressure campaign in their districts. As pointed out last week, when they can't kill the Resolution or avoid hearing it, they will water it down with a Fake End Walz' Powers bill. Unfortunately, Republicans like Marion O'Neill and Barb Haley are betraying their voters by participating in the crafting of the fake bill. Let's keep the pressure on these legislators. We've been building resources for this fight and we know **[YOU will keep helping us out](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=they_re_betraying_us&n=4)** until we finally win and End Walz' Emergency Powers once and for all. Thank you for all the support! **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty** Action 4 Liberty 1920 Oakcrest Ave #5 Roseville, MN 55113
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=they_re_betraying_us&n=5).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=they_re_betraying_us&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=they_re_betraying_us&n=7), software for leaders.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Four More Years Starts Now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
On Monday, during a pandemic-adjusted ceremony, Governor Holcomb and Lt. Governor Crouch were sworn into their second term, and I couldn’t be more... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/four-more-years-starts-now?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Four More Years Starts Now**_ On Monday, during a pandemic-adjusted ceremony, Governor Holcomb and Lt. Governor Crouch were sworn into their second term, and I couldn’t be more optimistic for Indiana’s future. As the governor said during his second inaugural address; “it’s important to look to the future, a future for our state and our citizens that I believe is full of hope and opportunity.” Monday’s ceremony begins the next four years of Republican leadership in the statehouse and the Holcomb-Crouch team will continue their mission of building One Indiana for All.

And the governor hasn’t taken his foot off the gas. Earlier this week, he introduced his proposed state budget, and Indiana once again sits in a much better fiscal position than many other states. The governor’s budget calls for paying down debts, restoring funding to many programs and projects that were paused at the outset of the pandemic, and investing an additional $377 million in new money for our schools.

Additionally, on Monday, Todd Rokita assumed the office of Indiana Attorney General. I’m grateful Todd is in his new role. He’ll be a good partner to the governor and to our legislative supermajorities in the statehouse as he protects and defends the laws of Indiana.

We also received great news on the vaccination front, as Bloomberg News cites Indiana as having the highest vaccination rate in the Midwest. With the announcement earlier this week that all Hoosiers 70 and over can now receive the vaccine, I know these impressive vaccination rates will continue. We can see the light at the end of the tunnel. -Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| _**Continuing to Build One Indiana for All**_ It's been another busy week for **Governor Holcomb**!

On Monday, **Governor Holcomb** and **Lt. Gov. Suzanne Crouch** were sworn into their second term in office. Under their leadership, Indiana has broken records and has become a true destination for people to live, work, play, and stay. During their second term, the Holcomb-Crouch team will continue their mission of building One Indiana for All! _**“It’s important to look to the future, a future for our state and our citizens that I believe is full of hope and opportunity.” -Governor Holcomb**_ On Wednesday, **Governor Holcomb** introduced his [2021 budget proposal](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=82618a8291&e=1acd9bb3d6). Under his leadership and watchful eye, Indiana is in a better fiscal position than our neighbors. While many states have made cuts to essential services, Gov. Holcomb's budget proposal will allow Indiana to fully fund areas that are vital to our state’s continued success. That includes paying our debts, restoring funding to many programs and projects that were forced to pause due to the pandemic, and investing an additional $377 million in new money for our schools. For his full [budget proposal](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9fa7a80280&e=1acd9bb3d6), click [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c1c69eae22&e=1acd9bb3d6). [\--> View Gov. Holcomb's Budget Proposal Here <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6c0a1243e3&e=1acd9bb3d6) To stay up to date on the latest developments, make sure you're following** Governor Holcomb** on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c97eaa2a82&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5288cdf6c3&e=1acd9bb3d6), and [Instagram](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a64dd61359&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
|
---
|
---
| _**2021 State of the State Address**_ On Tuesday, January 19, **Governor Holcomb** will deliver his 2021 State of the State address. You won't want to miss this year's address as he lays out his plans to continue building One Indiana for All!
---
|
---
| _**Fourth Consecutive Year of Record Economic Development**_ **Governor Holcomb** announced that [2020 was](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6433832b0d&e=1acd9bb3d6)[ a fourth consecutive, record-breaking year for economic development in Indiana.](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=72a3a978cd&e=1acd9bb3d6) In total, Indiana secured 282 commitments from companies to locate or grow in the state. These businesses plan to invest more than $5.6 billion into their Indiana operations and create up to 31,300 new Hoosier jobs with average wages of $28.13/hour. For more information click [here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6047ad16b7&e=1acd9bb3d6).
_**“Despite being an incredibly challenging year for Hoosier businesses in many different ways, I’m extremely encouraged and inspired by the perseverance of our business community. Achieving another record-breaking year for economic development in 2020 shows us that Indiana is on the right track and that better times are ahead for Hoosiers, with more than 31,000 new career opportunities over the next few years.”
-Governor Holcomb**_
---
|
---
| _**Governor Holcomb's Proposed Budget**_ On Wednesday **Governor Holcomb** proposed his budget for the next two years. Holcomb proposed several one-time initiatives that will not require on-going funding obligations. K-12 funding will also be increased again. The Holcomb administration called the state's financial situation a "pleasant surprise" and believe that Indiana's budget reserves should return to pre-pandemic levels in 2021. Here are a few major items on Governor Holcomb's budget proposal:
* Increased investment in education by $377 million in NEW money for schools
* $702 million to pay down various debt liabilities, saving Hoosiers on interest payments in the long run
* Replenishing unemployment insurance fund to continue supporting Hoosiers impacted by COVID-19
* Cash payments for capital projects, saving Hoosiers millions on future interest payments
* Rebuilding and maintaining a healthy reserve fund
* $100 million for broadband expansion for underserved communities
* Maintaining support for Workforce Ready and Employer Training Grants
* Maintain Support for Manufacturing Readiness Grants
* Restarting Next Level Trails program

---
|
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7d258c07b4&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Vaccines for Hoosiers_**
Thanks to Governor Holcomb and Operation Warp Speed Indiana continues to set the bar and lead the way in the Midwest. The most recent report from Bloomberg shows Indiana as the best in the Midwest in COVID-19 vaccine distribution. Not only is Indiana getting vaccines distributed quickly, but now Hoosiers 70+ can schedule to get vaccinated.
[\--> Click here for information on the COVID-19 vaccine in Indiana <\--](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=155e12053b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb **[is sworn in for a second term](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8eb3bb4ae2&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch **[launches second round of Taking Care of Main Street](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f11cb86474&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young **[promotes funding for South Shore Line Double Track project](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=dbb80c55d7&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Mike Braun **[joined Governor Holcomb's COVID-19 press conference](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3ebe7aaf90&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski **[named ranking member of House ethics committee](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0c60990315&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks **[sworn in for a third term](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9b84572c3d&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Baird **[shares information on the Paycheck Protection Program](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d0910769de&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Victoria Spartz **[says socialism won't work in America](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4832e32a29&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Greg Pence **[shares vaccine information for Hoosiers 70+](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6ed06ceb0c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Bucshon **[praises Operation Warp Speed](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d0a57a19a4&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Trey Hollingsworth **[recognizes National Law Enforcement Appreciation day](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=bff5ebf954&e=1acd9bb3d6)

name: Raya Salter
subject: Climate justice: Here's how we go national
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
This has been some of the most exciting work of my career.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/308?t=2&akid=5941%2E53494%2Ei-c0-v) Friend, My name is Raya Salter. I am an energy attorney, educator, activist, a Black woman, and an Evergreen advisory board member. I'm also a member of the New York State Climate Action Council, where I'm working to implement New York State's climate law. Thanks to the tireless contributions of environmental justice groups, New York has some of the nation's most ambitious and just state climate goals—the kind that Evergreen is pushing for nationally. New York law requires protecting and investing in the communities that pollution and climate change have harmed the most. In fact, it was the New York law, powered by grassroots activists, that provided the blueprint for the Biden-Harris climate plan requirement that 40% of climate investments be directed to environmental justice communities. How do we identify those communities? In New York, the law requires a diverse stakeholder process that includes the use of a data-driven tool called equity mapping—and it holds a lot of promise for delivering climate justice nationwide. [**Want to learn about what states have learned through equity mapping and how we can scale it up nationally? Read Evergreen's equity mapping policy memo, produced in partnership with Dēmos, today!**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1520?t=3&akid=5941%2E53494%2Ei-c0-v) [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1520?t=4&akid=5941%2E53494%2Ei-c0-v) | [READ THE MEMO](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/1520?t=5&akid=5941%2E53494%2Ei-c0-v)
---
Racial and social justice is climate justice. Working to make New York a national leader for just climate action has been some of my most important lifework. I can't wait to see where equity mapping, community investment, and climate protection can take us, and I look forward to pushing it to the top of America's agenda with you.
Thank you,
Raya Salter, Esq.
Evergreen Advisory Board Member
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=5941%2E53494%2Ei-c0-v). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION

clean_body: This has been some of the most exciting work of my career. | Friend, My name is Raya Salter. I am an energy attorney, educator, activist, a Black woman, and an Evergreen advisory board member. I'm also a member of the New York State Climate Action Council, where I'm working to implement New York State's climate law. Thanks to the tireless contributions of environmental justice groups, New York has some of the nation's most ambitious and just state climate goals—the kind that Evergreen is pushing for nationally. New York law requires protecting and investing in the communities that pollution and climate change have harmed the most. In fact, it was the New York law, powered by grassroots activists, that provided the blueprint for the Biden-Harris climate plan requirement that 40% of climate investments be directed to environmental justice communities. How do we identify those communities? In New York, the law requires a diverse stakeholder process that includes the use of a data-driven tool called equity mapping—and it holds a lot of promise for delivering climate justice nationwide. | Racial and social justice is climate justice. Working to make New York a national leader for just climate action has been some of my most important lifework. I can't wait to see where equity mapping, community investment, and climate protection can take us, and I look forward to pushing it to the top of America's agenda with you. Thank you, Raya Salter, Esq. Evergreen Advisory Board Member

name: Mike Thompson
subject: He will be held accountable
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://email
body:
# [#]
Peter,

On Wednesday, with strong bipartisan support, I voted to impeach Donald Trump for a second time.

The Capitol is our nation’s citadel of democracy and a beacon of hope for people around the world. It has been so for nearly 250 years. Last week, Donald Trump instigated an attack on our Capitol to disrupt the Constitutional process of certifying the votes of the Electoral College. This was a blatant attempt to overturn our Presidential election and decimate our democracy. For this, Donald Trump MUST be held accountable.

Although we are less than a week from a transfer of power, it is important for us to uphold the standards of our nation. We must be clear about the fact that we will not stand idly by as Donald Trump and his insurrectionist followers demean what we stand for and incite violence throughout our country.

I took an oath to work for the people of our nation — that’s why I voted for the Article of Impeachment charging the President with inciting this grave attack. He must be held accountable, and the Senate must swiftly convict and remove him from office.

Thank you for your continued support,

Mike Thompson

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Indiana’s ninth straight balanced budget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
While states all across the country are tightening their belts and making drastic funding cuts across the board, Hoosiers will be seeing the exact... | |
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7a684741df704b9585ab7067448d4588&_e=jXsbkmS3uRKvNLdLGhfvfdE0dFDW2GtQsWYoepVxivGUab4X0t8Q48m25iepbYTSovxG5YkIoC9Dd5Uw0oG0RRq2J5yuco2ltZk1z7us37DrxcH8J3RMvOJTPiZ8GsAFISXMXa2tG0ACXzQMIytV8Ha1W0QHX-xywKRw1fTOmDbnP95cjzrhkmkUa5U1Q1oNknEC5XYYW9Vr0_V5s2iio6_IXLLQbv2zJkB7eI6zSU_HNBJaYk6nlJwLAeBvU7e11JPhWj3eDhVLq3p7M-EQ5pxL50yH0W_-AyttDmuNAHzCS7CAYafMJE5I98k935jW5pfRHd-UNu7Dr6f1lRGukjIW9A3Cn7zN9_PyY-r6COsMgnxFIj0cDF0lr380yUi6Kh2tRBOGUKpkVtPW9Qc2Cxvb1ti6z6TwvjOR6dOHeVRT455AHNL34g32LQ5eTNZlEf8eZcVmBWKgAFzsMeLxZZRSX17okxBUqHXS2NpCcaIPQTYHyL-sPH6t2ndcqaBd) |
---|---|---
|
---
Friend,

Governor Holcomb just unveiled his budget proposal for Indiana–– _the ninth straight balanced budget in a row_ –– and we’re here to give you the full picture of what’s in it.

Here’s the bottom line:

**While states all across the country have to make drastic funding cuts across the board, Hoosiers will be seeing the exact opposite.**

You read that right, Friend.

Indiana’s schools, roads, and businesses will actually be seeing an **increase** in funding over the coming year as a result of Governor Holcomb’s common-sense fiscal management –– and that’s great news for every Hoosier.
[**Share the Great News**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7a684741df704b9585ab7067448d4588&_e=jXsbkmS3uRKvNLdLGhfvfdE0dFDW2GtQsWYoepVxivGUab4X0t8Q48m25iepbYTSovxG5YkIoC9Dd5Uw0oG0RRq2J5yuco2ltZk1z7us37DrxcH8J3RMvOJTPiZ8GsAFISXMXa2tG0ACXzQMIytV8Ha1W0QHX-xywKRw1fTOmDbnP95cjzrhkmkUa5U1Q1oNknEC5XYYW9Vr0_V5s2iio6_IXLLQbv2zJkB7eI6zSU_HNBJaYk6nlJwLAeBvU7e11JPhWj3eDhVLq3p7M-EQ5pxL50yH0W_-AyttDmuNAHyKHiXRw8aJGcJwd6I2Cw7JwKmhzk68mEHwRj-uo8vTUe0z-11EbTDUKYCUYbD-KgKny_ygbS0Luu1ik1WWMLnyhqYwO5rznrvefl9j-pRQwBMqwXarT_xRe8uLNJB2k4V6eq4uUeUY4vfGkwHMRNxIfzqIUsZL179lffCRv9tdeF9IVhL4c8wVuKIp2Brm7hdoyeGPkkUkYGjZoi8LDP-d)
_Here are some of Governor Holcomb’s top budget priorities:_

**Protect Indiana’s historic investments in K-12 Education**
Throughout the pandemic, our teachers, administrators, and schools have gone above and beyond to safely teach students. We must provide them an increase in funding under the new budget so that they can continue to support children’s education.

**Maintain Support for Manufacturing Readiness Grants**
The pandemic made it clear that we as a nation must create and support manufacturing operations. By investing in manufacturing grants, Hoosier companies will be able to lead the way in creating critical products such as personal protective equipment.

**Defend historic investments in Workforce Ready and Employer Training Grants**
Indiana has made historic investments in the Hoosier workforce since 2017, leading to more businesses setting up shop and more jobs being created right here at home. As Indiana looks to come out of the pandemic stronger than ever, we must continue to pave the way for a strong recovery by investing in the Hoosier workforce and the jobs of tomorrow.

**Pay down debt to save Hoosiers on future interest payments**
Governor Holcomb’s budget proposal doubles down on fiscal responsibility by paying off $702 million in various state and local debt liabilities. This payment will save Hoosiers money by eliminating future interest payments and will also free up money local school corporations can use for teacher pay increases.
[**Share the Great News**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7a684741df704b9585ab7067448d4588&_e=jXsbkmS3uRKvNLdLGhfvfdE0dFDW2GtQsWYoepVxivGUab4X0t8Q48m25iepbYTSovxG5YkIoC9Dd5Uw0oG0RRq2J5yuco2ltZk1z7us37DrxcH8J3RMvOJTPiZ8GsAFISXMXa2tG0ACXzQMIytV8Ha1W0QHX-xywKRw1fTOmDbnP95cjzrhkmkUa5U1Q1oNknEC5XYYW9Vr0_V5s2iio6_IXLLQbv2zJkB7eI6zSU_HNBJaYk6nlJwLAeBvU7e11JPhWj3eDhVLq3p7M-EQ5pxL50yH0W_-AyttDmuNAHx5bDGa_NVpu6VGmWFiOfVNRaX3YxlFktt5j8F9S_SvUX6HGo8tfxCYXT7qJ_kIXxnP7ZDxVOA0cQkkBTJnBr8AL2gvp6gQVHDvcyjZ9M0heJqqGQMwZOa_VRj41QxJfusq2yi09EogzUXgkpY46G4d9H0CrehUiqGzS3LCj22--519eCmCwzU39j0fP8AEzcbHStFkXMA1KFa6rXIo9bPW)
Each of these crucial investments will pave the way for better schools, stronger infrastructure, more jobs, and more booming businesses within our state borders not just in 2021, but for years to come.

Governor Holcomb couldn’t be any more proud of how Hoosiers have stepped up in the face of all the challenges brought on by the pandemic, and he’s even more excited about our future.

**We need your help to share the good news, Friend.[Click here to share the details about Governor Holcomb’s budget with your family and friends on social media!](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=7a684741df704b9585ab7067448d4588&_e=jXsbkmS3uRKvNLdLGhfvfWgx9XK1d33c5gc3F9_7MZX1OhdyyRED7IyZnykJ4lR3ls8uyA5FNxTUxoa51RWBCvpv9keNDyAnPMNcrPMs_JIuRO-ZHdKljNKzyvjSQZ-HBAfRLNmKegGVbhw2WLEuvFfhtOHZ8MswGXNsd83GMSH_0yxYlBOBREAQD17n2ysL1dFH9yghHevJwGYjDCzSPMldfWtyT4pv7YR08Rhrpq9bzZb8gGRtR21V1lOLc0qcBr1uIeJeE-1zdyXQ9zfaW0CyEtCRS7h6U-zKZmWubo9eMF7y8p1bud3rMzoubPPVxID8gyc5bDGYZbvYE5ReHrj0FsP27f2rGiLiBRK3cVjaShLdkvQ-t6ygh2ms1HUDX0pIZZa9sC3__nQbd-eQEUcJ7SWIbGHFPKTZdv38BQH1tIF38ukGUepJJyjxpxSh1Q0inDG973r66caIr1a750otCgZzpZD_fzPkqAkvnAI%3D)**

Thank you,
Holcomb Crew

Newsom ate at a fancy Napa Valley restaurant after telling Californians not to! ❌ Austin Mayor flew to Cabo after telling residents not to travel for Thanksgiving! ❌ Nancy Pelosi got her hair done while salons are still closed to the public! What can we do? We do that by supporting Republicans dedicated to serving our communities, protecting small businesses, and upholding the Constitution. Peter, that’s why I’m reaching out to you. Peter, throughout this crisis, Democrats have proven they don’t care about you. They have abused their power and crushed American small businesses in every corner of our great nation. That’s why our only hope to end Democrat lockdowns and safeguard the American Dream for generations to come is to Take Back the House in 2022! Thank you, Andrew Garbarino | | | PAID FOR BY GARBARINO FOR CONGRESS | | P.O. Box 101, Bayport, NY 11705 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

Terry wants to invest in education, rebuild Virginia's economy, and create a stronger, more equitable Commonwealth.
His bold vision is precisely what we need right now -- but extremists in the Virginia Republican Party disagree.
Instead of moving the Commonwealth forward, all they want to do is continue Donald Trump’s dangerous legacy in the Virginia Governor’s office.
Derek, you don’t have to look any further than the violent insurrection at our Capitol last week to understand what a disaster that would be for the Commonwealth.

name: Tim Burchett
subject: Why I Voted No on Impeachment 🙅
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=2a2386559d334b7d9fcc7127e4d1bcdf&_e=l8GvcqhuxzZU7LUekmI0XS7wB_7n-FT3enjNgg92jOp5BUO6UiinGuJXz-PlqC4bMSkTqqx87vRI6xAwMMyWvWED5B39So1MPFuCLfTkMU0hXMubNGo2B8a_lP4kLLbjbheV-oUDw-w715WdSkZb7zyYcbONMipL8qrEUhagKdKPj1fDPTp_ojStQJgLhYK822gU1VhgUgBAZw0w8DfqO-sbb3YfPYutNqeKoxz-8X7JjJyc9eFoS890IGhuQ2_g6KDijml0Y-vlg5bPbqBywSpFxtnI6vxXo1D3UwaoiYg%3D) **Why I Voted No on Impeachment 🙅
** _Photo Courtesy of the Associated Press_ Last Wednesday’s attack on the Capitol was despicable in every way. Those responsible for the violence and chaos should be held accountable and prosecuted. **Our nation needs to heal and move forward.** Impeaching the president, with less than a week left to his term, will achieve the opposite. Let’s not forget we’re in the middle of a pandemic that has claimed too many lives and closed too many businesses. We need to focus on distributing the vaccine, reopening our economy, and providing relief to those who need it most. Finally, a legitimate process can’t be fast forwarded like a bad CD. The hearing on Wednesday was a rush job with no witnesses, setting a terrible precedent for due process in the future. **That’s why I voted no on impeachment and hope my colleagues don’t spend a moment longer on it.** | |
---
**We Lost the Senate 👎
**
Earlier this month, the Democrats [won](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=2a2386559d334b7d9fcc7127e4d1bcdf&_e=l8GvcqhuxzZU7LUekmI0XWB5YObrzGatOUVEsFlkxuIeZ9HKljmU_PvrsV79pANtw_60YwA_tZ076r5MDJdfRJ3Ec5lMgzvh7yGpmRv0aLXLfeJRXFlTDqYQowC26lW15yKUOrpZHCh10oTGqNCYg8Zelw16A2BR3wB6KFuEXra_I_NhuQua-Eni3Wt98IVuX49p4KymuL7VFZI5f7bna9j9cP6PFz6u7um2tqj3Cmq_UZ80AsZxYtlwQVmxl_X3AM9Ti-dhPfhwSPRu1Xj-MJbgnXnObLquNLdJ7wIcyXUi6-Iv1Uhqi0FOVkVUXR_dHg2TzOHIKEbRX6Lm2lpWrmscQ4SRmvTU8IqI9J_ksJZqdhPUCz-7eYHDdW7CQyztRcGxhzjJ_Et5rPD8dH392h3EAeILlpIfW1bkP6E_0cY%3D) both Senate races in the Georgia runoff election, taking control of the U.S. Senate. That means Nancy Pelosi and Chuck Schumer will control both chambers of Congress on January 20.

This was a huge loss for conservatives and for the country. Democrats have not been shy about their liberal wishlist. The Green New Deal. Socialist healthcare. Packing the Supreme Court. Huge tax increases. Democrats are talking about implementing all of it.

**It’ll be up to Republicans to band together to counter the left’s growing power.** And it’ll be up to us to prepare for 2022 so we can take back the House and Senate.
|
---
**Just for Fun 🦈**
_Photo Courtesy of Grainger Today_
_ _
**It’s been a challenging year for students and teachers, but some teachers continue to shine.** Props to teacher Linda Burchett (no relation, but maybe there’s something magical about the name?) whose third grade class at Bean Station Elementary started the new semester learning about the sea and creating a wall panel to be displayed at the National Aquarium. Nice to see Grainger County represented up north!
|

**

name: Dr. Nicole Alexander-Scott, RIDOH
subject: Vaccine Update
body:
---
| | | | | | Hello friend,
This is Dr. Nicole Alexander-Scott, Director of the Rhode Island Department of Health. I'm reaching out to provide an update on the state of our COVID-19 vaccine distribution.
Right now, the biggest challenge facing Rhode Island's vaccine program - like most other states throughout the country - is that we are not receiving a lot of vaccine. Still, we are doing the best we can with what we have. To date, we have administered more than 51,000 doses of the COVID-19 vaccine. That puts Rhode Island near the top of the CDC's rankings of states by the number of doses administered per capita. Our systems are working, and I'm proud of the job we're doing. Getting those doses administered is very operationally complex. From beginning to end, it involves ordering, shipping, receiving, redistribution, and more. We're grateful to everyone throughout the state who is working to make that happen.
---
| I want to provide a little more detail on who has been vaccinated this week:

* Almost all of the nursing homes in the state were visited once.
* Many hospital workers are receiving their second doses now. Urgent care staff and respiratory clinic staff are getting vaccinated, and we are continuing to hold clinics for EMS personnel, school nurses, and others.
* The Rhode Island National Guard is operating a clinic at Sockanosset for people who are doing COVID-19 testing, some pharmacy staff, and staff from our two Alternate Hospital Sites.
* Some limited vaccinating is still happening in Central Falls.

---
| There was a lot of news this week about the federal government urging states to vaccinate people who are 65 years of age and older. We want to get vaccine to people older than 65 too. The limiting factor is not federal rules, or our approach in Rhode Island. The limiting factor is the amount of vaccine we are getting. We are getting 14,000 first doses of vaccine a week. There are close to 190,000 people in Rhode Island who are 65 years of age and older. It would not be honest or fair of us to say that all Rhode Islanders older than 65 can get vaccinated tomorrow, because we just don't have the vaccine.
We've seen the confusion and frustration that has resulted in states that have opened eligibility to groups that they did not have enough vaccine for. In Rhode Island, we are vaccinating older adults incrementally and thoughtfully. That means that when we tell you you can get vaccinated, you know that there is a real, physical vaccine waiting for you - not just that you fall into a broad category that is eligible to get a vaccine when we eventually have one. Please know that if we could, we would make sure that everyone got vaccinated immediately. But we're just not getting enough vaccine right now, so we're doing the best we can with what we have.
I know that there is tremendous demand for vaccine, and I understand why. Frankly, this high demand gives me hope. This has been an enormously trying 10 months for so many Rhode Islanders. There will come a time when vaccine will be available for every person who wants to get vaccinated in Rhode Island. Until that time comes, we're asking for you to be patient, and to take all the other steps we know can help keep you and the people you love safe. That means wearing a mask, practicing social distancing, and washing your hands regularly.
Nicole-Alexander Scott, MD, MPH Director, Rhode Island Department of Health
---
|
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---

name: Tea Party Patriots Action

name: True the Vote
subject: Weekly Update | The Past is Prologue | 1.15.21
body:
A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity.
| | | | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLnJldnYuY28lMkZwZ19lX25ld3NsZXR0ZXJfNzIzMjAlM0Z1dG1fc291cmNlJTNEZW1haWxfUEclMjZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ24lM0R0dGYlMjZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtJTNERW1haWwlMjZ1dG1fY29udGVudCUzRFBHX25ld3NsZXR0ZXJfMDcyMzIw&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=363A855A20A3849)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | THE PAST IS PROLOGUE
---
| |
Friends,
It is the time of new things. A new month, a new year ... and new challenges. Lots of new challenges.

We must honestly reflect on what we’ve come through and prepare for what lies ahead.
The fact is that most voters took elections for granted. Now, Americans want answers. How could our electoral process have moved so far away from the simple premise of one legal voter, one legal vote? And where do we go from here?

It's time for rebuilding. For renewed effort. After all that we've seen, to fall back into the same routines is unthinkable. We must do better. We can do better.
We must stay engaged in the protection of voters’ rights.
That's exactly why True the Vote took a major step in court this week. Stacy Abrams’ groups Fair Fight and Fair Fight Action are pushing to silence citizens and prevent voters from petitioning their government. **We sued to stop them in their tracks**. All voters, all citizens should be able to participate in election processes without fear of suppression or intimidation. Enough is enough.
Many state legislatures are already in session, which means election decisions will be made, bills will be proposed or passed - we must all stay informed. And it's True the Vote's job to help every citizen do just that. We’ve got a lot of ramping up to do in order to make that happen, but it must be done.
We are all in this together. Every American should want an election system free of mistrust, free of errors caused by negligence or nefariousness. A system that is open and transparent and accountable. It’s achievable, but it will take incredible levels of citizen engagement.
True the Vote is going forward into 2021, renewed, resolved, and ready to work. And we look forward to working alongside each and every one of you in the days ahead.
We must recognize this endeavor will be difficult. Stay the course.

In the coming weeks, we will introduce some major new initiatives and incredible tools that will empower every American in their effort to help make America’s election process great again.
One step at a time, one person at a time, one community at a time - working together we really can true the vote.

Onward,

---
| |
---
| | Catherine Engelbrecht
Founder, True the Vote
---
| |
---
|
---
| | BIG NEWS
---
| | **[True the Vote Sues Fair Fight Action Over Intimidation Tactics](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLXN1ZXMtZmFpci1maWdodC1hY3Rpb24tb3Zlci1pbnRpbWlkYXRpb24tdGFjdGljcyUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=363A855A20A3866)**

ATLANTA, Georgia – This week, True The Vote filed a countersuit against Fair Fight Action, Inc. in the U.S. District Court for the Northern District of Georgia, asking the court to stop Fair Fight Action from continuing its effort to intimidate True The Vote and Georgia voters who lawfully submitted elector challenges in their counties prior to the Jan. 5 election.

"Fair Fight Action’s legal attack sought to chill the efforts of True The Vote and Georgia voters across the state who petitioned their counties to protect the right to vote for all legal voters in the Jan. 5 runoff election," **said True the Vote Founder and President Catherine Engelbrecht.** "This case aims to fight back against a group that took square aim at the constitutional rights of those committed to election integrity. Citizens have the right to petition of government. We will stand against any who would try to stifle that right through intimidation tactics."

[READ MORE](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ0cnVlLXRoZS12b3RlLXN1ZXMtZmFpci1maWdodC1hY3Rpb24tb3Zlci1pbnRpbWlkYXRpb24tdGFjdGljcyUyRg==&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=363A855A20A3866)
---
| | WHAT YOU CAN DO
---
| | [Working Together For Accountability, Integrity, And Fairness](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ0cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmclMkZ2b2x1bnRlZXIlMkY=&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=363A855A20A3867)
It has been a long election, and we all know there's much more work yet to be done.

You can be a part of the process along with True the Vote. Just staying informed as citizen by receiving all our news and updates, you'll be helping to ensure the health of our system.

You can be an integral part of citizen-led efforts to ensure the integrity of your local ballot process. And with new apps and new ways to help right in your own backyard, you'll have phenomenal tools to get the job done right.

Don't wait. After all that's happened, after all the hardship of the last year, let's not waste one more minute just watching. Let's start doing something about it, together.

Sign up, Stay informed, and Volunteer with True the Vote!

clean_body: A weekly wrap up of all things election integrity. | | | | | | | | | THE PAST IS PROLOGUE | | Friends, It is the time of new things. A new month, a new year ... and new challenges. Lots of new challenges. We must honestly reflect on what we’ve come through and prepare for what lies ahead. The fact is that most voters took elections for granted. Now, Americans want answers. How could our electoral process have moved so far away from the simple premise of one legal voter, one legal vote? And where do we go from here? It's time for rebuilding. For renewed effort. After all that we've seen, to fall back into the same routines is unthinkable. We must do better. We can do better. We must stay engaged in the protection of voters’ rights. That's exactly why True the Vote took a major step in court this week. Stacy Abrams’ groups Fair Fight and Fair Fight Action are pushing to silence citizens and prevent voters from petitioning their government. We sued to stop them in their tracks. All voters, all citizens should be able to participate in election processes without fear of suppression or intimidation. Enough is enough. Many state legislatures are already in session, which means election decisions will be made, bills will be proposed or passed - we must all stay informed. And it's True the Vote's job to help every citizen do just that. We’ve got a lot of ramping up to do in order to make that happen, but it must be done. We are all in this together. Every American should want an election system free of mistrust, free of errors caused by negligence or nefariousness. A system that is open and transparent and accountable. It’s achievable, but it will take incredible levels of citizen engagement. True the Vote is going forward into 2021, renewed, resolved, and ready to work. And we look forward to working alongside each and every one of you in the days ahead. We must recognize this endeavor will be difficult. Stay the course. In the coming weeks, we will introduce some major new initiatives and incredible tools that will empower every American in their effort to help make America’s election process great again. One step at a time, one person at a time, one community at a time - working together we really can true the vote. Onward, | | | | Catherine Engelbrecht Founder, True the Vote | | | | | BIG NEWS | | ATLANTA, Georgia – This week, True The Vote filed a countersuit against Fair Fight Action, Inc. in the U.S. District Court for the Northern District of Georgia, asking the court to stop Fair Fight Action from continuing its effort to intimidate True The Vote and Georgia voters who lawfully submitted elector challenges in their counties prior to the Jan. 5 election. "Fair Fight Action’s legal attack sought to chill the efforts of True The Vote and Georgia voters across the state who petitioned their counties to protect the right to vote for all legal voters in the Jan. 5 runoff election," said True the Vote Founder and President Catherine Engelbrecht. "This case aims to fight back against a group that took square aim at the constitutional rights of those committed to election integrity. Citizens have the right to petition of government. We will stand against any who would try to stifle that right through intimidation tactics." | | WHAT YOU CAN DO | | It has been a long election, and we all know there's much more work yet to be done. You can be a part of the process along with True the Vote. Just staying informed as citizen by receiving all our news and updates, you'll be helping to ensure the health of our system. You can be an integral part of citizen-led efforts to ensure the integrity of your local ballot process. And with new apps and new ways to help right in your own backyard, you'll have phenomenal tools to get the job done right. Don't wait. After all that's happened, after all the hardship of the last year, let's not waste one more minute just watching. Let's start doing something about it, together. Sign up, Stay informed, and Volunteer with True the Vote! | | | | | | | | | | Engage with us on Social Media: | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 True the Vote, All rights reserved | | True The Vote, PO Box 3109 #19128, Houston, TX 77253-3109, United States

| | | | Peter – We’re 5 days away from Inauguration, and from turning the page on what has been a dark period in our nation’s history.

Over the last four years, the work you’ve done as candidates, local leaders, and staffers has time and again proven to be invaluable to the success of the Democratic party. And the future of our nation.

We are proud of what we have accomplished together, and excited for what's to come.

We are ready to redouble our efforts to train as many Democrats as we can, to help our country build back better, and to build a new blue wave to sweep the nation.

With that in mind, take a look at some of our upcoming Virtual Live Trainings and recent blog posts, or head on over to our [Online Academy](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiZG1wbHR0NXhiMW8zbXZ4cGtwcmwiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL3RyYWluZGVtb2NyYXRzLm9yZy9kYXNoYm9hcmQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9TkRUQ1x1MDAyNnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU1BSUxcdTAwMjZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249VExEUlx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9) and check out some of our free resources to help you succeed in the new year.

Let’s get to work.

— The NDTC Team

P.S. — NDTC’s virtual office will be closed on January 15th and 18th in observance of Martin Luther King, Jr. Day.

name: Nikki Haley
subject: The next chapter…
body:
[ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=07f941d89b594ed38933a890f2d69646&_e=t0XB8zMU8dvz8P_sRrOPBbnqfT0Wsw0o5PDWpQhkahOKWK1Rh9oRr1fg5WiA0RjpF-Md6yrnhlTTLzDhyYX-7gL5lnMmvFjxog9lgBSA5XcuWBK39gmWfItJF4petHJanln2J3dNzxR3bE86NIsZ3K8RYX8H8QmRVTvP7s2N3aSBPMGAALYL20fziqRxG5MY7QiSh3Ch4n0uLBtjvtw6QqaOFmyqBe_r5RX0WwZf9MMIvJPrNNmJaaQmz5Gz5z1xmViWUHr9oSzMvR57zdEdsEozaL2HYYnPdp8JhwNOLo6LNKV8n2Qg_77K3EYpHXWJjRXKsoBWA91UDlwYqkLuceUGRZnouA69tD6BCB7-t7i960_ROOFtnTjp_LBQdoIG) Fellow Patriot, When I sat in the Oval Office before my last press conference as UN Ambassador, I made a promise to keep standing for America. I renewed that promise last fall at the Republican National Convention. I am not done, not by a long shot. [ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=07f941d89b594ed38933a890f2d69646&_e=t0XB8zMU8dvz8P_sRrOPBbnqfT0Wsw0o5PDWpQhkahOKWK1Rh9oRr1fg5WiA0RjpF-Md6yrnhlTTLzDhyYX-7gL5lnMmvFjxog9lgBSA5XcuWBK39gmWfItJF4petHJanln2J3dNzxR3bE86NIsZ3K8RYX8H8QmRVTvP7s2N3aSMdmTpmVlqLhLkRgl_uDCAv9g6UQ643QUAujNKUYinUkUgOQ8ipl0iuiLbGcZsFwXdzKiAznpn20Ja6oqaBOf2JZnxICUt6RfC0FiWNwIGBqHBZ0DwyY5qKl3G7hW5smhCEndiVBxHD4iO0mvGVlUJQ3vMjfB2YlVul1t6YOn96quEhhd5dpw_QxH6t7Xjwam6QkhfL3zTeAs6FDwhOygT) Because you and I know it is crucial to stand for what you believe in. Two years ago, I launched Stand For America, an advocacy group with more than 1.6 million members focused on promoting public policies that strengthen America’s economy, culture, and national security. Together, with patriots like you on board, we have made significant strides in influencing policy, whether it was collecting 200,000 petitions to confirm Amy Coney Barrett or standing up to Communist China. But our work is not done, and there has never been a more important moment to invest in advancing our conservative agenda. This mission is about more than just policy, it’s political. Which is why I am reaching out to let you know that our mission continues today with the launch of **STAND FOR AMERICA PAC.** [**And why I hope you will consider an inaugural donation of $35 or more right now and become a charter member of STAND FOR AMERICA PAC**.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=07f941d89b594ed38933a890f2d69646&_e=t0XB8zMU8dvz8P_sRrOPBbnqfT0Wsw0o5PDWpQhkahOKWK1Rh9oRr1fg5WiA0RjpF-Md6yrnhlTTLzDhyYX-7gL5lnMmvFjxog9lgBSA5XcuWBK39gmWfItJF4petHJanln2J3dNzxR3bE86NIsZ3K8RYX8H8QmRVTvP7s2N3aTTKvRiO5M8G69Y9tiTxXLZvFdMW1fkFUet3QEGhrSVJVxWH2WVzQVbY1OGKkHTLkuLiCT7hSVOygNlmARxWUK_1Xx5bM3ZRRWJMOtHDoJiizVl3EMu3aWqUxUdDHiPSboKkYKo3Nix4q_rKum8igw6aN6bI19VuL95S7l4Q5xUAqRhA0_yZQXPbBJ0X5mIsej3f9BSWgm3JOackXBTF3mn) You see, **STAND FOR AMERICA PAC** is a political action committee laser-focused on the 2022 midterms and electing a conservative force to the House of Representatives and U.S. Senate to serve as a bulwark against the liberal agendas of Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi. Nothing is more important than defending our shared values. Because you and I know the Democrats describe their agenda as a “return to normalcy...” But there is nothing “normal” about an agenda focused on socialism, defunding the police, the Green New Deal, and Medicare for All. That is why I knew I had to reach out to you right away – because there are only 22 months until the 2022 election. clean_body: Fellow Patriot, When I sat in the Oval Office before my last press conference as UN Ambassador, I made a promise to keep standing for America. I renewed that promise last fall at the Republican National Convention. I am not done, not by a long shot. Because you and I know it is crucial to stand for what you believe in. Two years ago, I launched Stand For America, an advocacy group with more than 1.6 million members focused on promoting public policies that strengthen America’s economy, culture, and national security. Together, with patriots like you on board, we have made significant strides in influencing policy, whether it was collecting 200,000 petitions to confirm Amy Coney Barrett or standing up to Communist China. But our work is not done, and there has never been a more important moment to invest in advancing our conservative agenda. This mission is about more than just policy, it’s political. Which is why I am reaching out to let you know that our mission continues today with the launch of STAND FOR AMERICA PAC. You see, STAND FOR AMERICA PAC is a political action committee laser-focused on the 2022 midterms and electing a conservative force to the House of Representatives and U.S. Senate to serve as a bulwark against the liberal agendas of Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi. Nothing is more important than defending our shared values. Because you and I know the Democrats describe their agenda as a “return to normalcy...” But there is nothing “normal” about an agenda focused on socialism, defunding the police, the Green New Deal, and Medicare for All. That is why I knew I had to reach out to you right away – because there are only 22 months until the 2022 election. And the Democrats already have a massive fundraising advantage. It is abundantly clear that now is the right moment to launch this effort and Democrats took control of the Senate when they won both runoff elections in Georgia. Now, Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden control all levels of government. You can be sure the Democrats won’t abandon their big-government vision in 2022, including “defund the police,” the Green New Deal, and Medicare for All. They are simply “rebranding” – which is just an attempt to hide the truth about what they really believe from voters. Now, there is nothing standing in the way of the Biden-Harris agenda – which is the furthest left the Democrat Party has gone in history. So, you and I have our work cut out for us... Recruiting, advising, training, and financially supporting strong conservatives to run in key House and Senate races to take back control of both chambers Defending GOP incumbents who are being targeted for defeat, especially swing-state and first-term officeholders (like the 18 freshmen elected last year during the Year of the Republican Woman) I hope you’ll agree this is an ambitious plan. The most important factor is time. Sitting on the sidelines and waiting to get involved is akin to doing nothing at all. And given the stakes, that's not an option for us. I am launching STAND FOR AMERICA PAC to keep my promise to continue standing up for the future of our country. Thank you in advance for standing with me in this mission. My very best, Nikki R.
